## Summary
<!-- One sentence: what should Linux Assistant be able to do? -->

## Motivation
<!-- Why is this useful? What problem does it solve? -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe the desired behavior or UI change. -->

## Alternatives Considered
<!-- Any other approaches you thought of? -->

## Additional Context
<!-- Screenshots, links, related issues, etc. -->
